name: Assassin
theme: A stealth fighter for players who do not like fighting head-on.
description: Assassins use speed, stealth, back attacks, poison, and critical strikes to defeat enemies before they can react. They are dangerous when positioned well, but fragile if caught in open combat.
strengths: Good at flanking and finishing enemies

starter_abilities.name: Shadow Step
starter_abilities.description: Dash up to 3 tiles. Useful for flanking or escaping.

starter_abilities.name: Backstab
starter_abilities.description: Deal extra damage if attacking from behind or from the side.

starter_abilities.name: Poison Blade
starter_abilities.description: Strike an enemy and apply poison for damage over time.

passives.name: Silent Hunter
passives.description: Gain bonus damage against enemies below 50% HP.

upgrade_paths.description: Unlock a defensive escape ability that lowers enemy accuracy for one turn.
Promote into a stronger assassin path with improved stealth and critical damage.

risk_reward_options.name: Forbidden Blade Oath
risk_reward_options.failure_effect: The assassin starts the next battle with reduced HP.
risk_reward_options.safe_failure_limit: Never permanently delete the class or character.

visual_identity.sprite_notes: Fast hooded fighter with twin blades, smoke effects, and dark-purple trail.

balance_notes.main_counterplay: Reveal, trap, surround, or hit the assassin with area attacks.
avoid: Do not give assassin high defense.
Do not let assassin one-shot every enemy.

name: Mage
theme: A ranged spellcaster for players who prefer strategy over direct fighting.
description: Mages attack from range using elemental spells, control effects, and magical bursts. They are powerful when protected, but weak if enemies close the distance.

starter_abilities.name: Flame Orb
starter_abilities.description: Launch a fire spell that deals higher damage and may burn.

starter_abilities.name: Slow Field
starter_abilities.description: Create a small field that lowers enemy movement for one turn.

passives.name: Mana Focus
passives.description: Regain 1 MP after defeating an enemy with a spell.

upgrade_paths.description: Choose a specialty: Fire Mage, Ice Mage, Storm Mage, Light Mage, or Dark Mage.
Promote into an advanced spellcaster with stronger range, area effects, and magic control.

risk_reward_options.name: Unstable Spellbook
risk_reward_options.success_effect: A random starter spell upgrades into a rare version.
risk_reward_options.failure_effect: Lose some MP at the start of the next battle.
risk_reward_options.safe_failure_limit: Never erase all spells or permanently brick the class.

visual_identity.sprite_notes: Robed caster with glowing hands, floating spellbook, and blue magic aura.

balance_notes.main_counterplay: Rush the mage, silence spells, drain MP, or use high-resistance enemies.
avoid: Do not give mage high defense.
Do not make spells free forever.
Do not let one spell solve every battle.
